summary: Milestones Tab | Hearing Announcement When Selecting a Milestone for Playback
description:
GIVEN the user is in the Milestones Tab
AND TTS is enabled

steps.action: WHEN the user selects a milestone to view the play
steps.result:
THEN the user will hear: “In the Milestones Carousel, X of X Milestones, *Play Type of Milestone*, *Play Description of Milestone*, Select to view this play”
AND the user should only hear it only the first time entering the menu
